reason: Successfully executed all test steps: navigated to app, found and clicked agent, verified status, sent message, granted GitHub access, waited for response, and verified GitHub username in response.
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891: Page loaded successfully with "Your Agents" view showing three agents including the target "QA-20260331-205058-xo3i" with "idle" status.
Step 2 - Clicked "QA-20260331-205058-xo3i" in sidebar: Successfully navigated to agent detail page showing "Start a conversation with QA-20260331-205058-xo3i" landing page.
Step 3 - Verified agent status: Agent status confirmed as "idle" (shown as blue badge), meeting the requirement of "running" or "idle".

Step 4 - Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username.": Message successfully sent via send button; agent status changed to "working" and activity indicator appeared.

Step 5 - GitHub account access grant card appeared: Card displayed "Access Requested: GitHub" with GitHub account checkbox. Selected GitHub account and clicked "Grant Access" button. Agent then requested API permission for "GET /user" endpoint. Clicked "Allow" to grant the API request.
Step 6 - Waited for agent response: Agent completed processing in 1m 7s (well within 4-minute limit). Agent status returned to "idle" indicating completion.
Step 7 - Verified response includes GitHub username: Response clearly states "Your GitHub username is yiw190." - username successfully extracted and displayed.
